title: AbsentLight
description: In Absent Light, night is deadlier, caves are suffocating, and the unseen hunts relentlessly. Resources are scarce, sanity wavers, and only the brave or the desperate venture beyond the glow of their last torch.
body: In Absent Light, darkness is a predator. Stray too far from your torch and something in the shadows will find you first. This modpack is built to be stable without sacrificing atmosphere, blending horror elements, haunting ambience, and terrifying mobs into a seamless, immersive experience.
